subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #06
subcodes.first_line: He is the glory of God to those in the kingdom of command and creation and the lamp of guidance to those in the heavens and the earth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انه لبهاء الله لمن فیملکوت الامر و الخلق و مصباح الهدی لمن فی السموآت و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @being a source of light; guidance, @light and darkness
